command_rows.purpose: wet observation intake accepts or rejects endpoint rows

formula_rows.next_required_action: complete accepted wet simulation evidence inputs, then rerun the command chain
complete accepted wet simulation evidence inputs, then rerun the command chain

input_rows.required_action: detector blank transfer already has accepted candidate rows; rerun only when replacing detector simulation evidence

populate wet simulation/assumption source manifest rows and run the wet observation manifest importer so source hashes, required fields, model controls, replicate counts, uncertainty intervals, and pre-registration status are bound before wet intake

populate claim-value simulation/assumption source manifest rows with claim_value_branch=detection_probability_value, estimates, confidence intervals, positive-control counts, threshold policy, controls, uncertainty model, source artifact path, source artifact hash, and pre-registration status; run the claim-value manifest importer before claim-value review

populate claim-value simulation/assumption source manifest rows with claim_value_branch=yield_wet_value, yield/wet-pass estimates, confidence intervals, wet trial counts, model id, controls, uncertainty model, source artifact path, source artifact hash, and pre-registration status; run the claim-value manifest importer before claim-value review
